positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical celestial botanical illustration featuring blooming mandalas composed of glowing cosmic flora and deep space elements. The composition is central and radial, with interwoven stylized vines, crescent moons, and geometric star formations rendered in an Art Nouveau style. Use a rich, deep indigo, violet, gold leaf, and teal color palette. The design must have a strong, clean silhouette and high contrast, suitable for direct placement on a fabric surface. Studio lighting setup, vector art aesthetic, perfect symmetry, highly defined line work, ultra-detailed.
negative: blurry, cropped, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, grain, sketch, realism, text, watermark, signature, jpeg artifacts, low resolution, amateur, out of focus
